sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n33970" key="e)mbasi/xutros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐμβᾰσίχυτρος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n33970.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pot-visitor</tr_>, name of a mouse in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:137" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">137</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
